name: design-decision-advisor
description: Empirical decision-making skill for computational design research — compares representations, optimizers, and objectives through automated experiments.

plugins.name: design-decision-advisor
plugins.description: Empirical decision-making assistant for computational design research. Compares design representations, optimization algorithms, and objectives through automated experiments with statistical analysis and visualizations. Uses JAX, PyTorch, BoTorch, NumPy, SciPy.
